name: 10guards
technologies: cybersecurity; ethical hacking; penetration testing; AI-assisted security recommendations; automated patching; compliance automation
product_description: Cybersecurity team exploring AI-assisted automation for penetration testing, security consulting, recommendations and possibly compliance/security testing workflows for EU consortium grants.
risks: Requires strong EU consortium partners; likely needs nonprofit/university coordinator; cofinancing around 30-50% for some calls; partner reliability risk; some calls may require TRL-7 or ready-to-market maturity.
target_topics: cybersecurity; AI-driven security testing; ethical hacking; automated penetration testing; compliance automation; Horizon Europe; consortium grants; EU partners
excluded_topics: short-deadline calls; grants requiring unavailable cofinancing; grants requiring fully mature TRL-7 product
extraction_notes: Manual extraction from meeting notes. PDF/JPG in the same folder look like identity/legal documents and were not used for matching fields.

name: IS Academy
technologies: psychometrics; game-based assessment; AI assistant; AI-generated reports; contextual search/RAG; educational product validation
product_description: Education product for teenagers/high-school students that combines psychometric methodology, game-based hidden assessment, cognitive-skill evaluation and AI-assisted final reports to help users understand strengths and career/learning directions.
risks: Needs clearer technical architecture and KPI; European market validation still needed; child/teen assessment may require specialist validation or certification; IP and publication strategy should be clarified; competitor analysis should be adapted for Europe.
target_topics: education; EdTech; AI; psychometrics; game-based assessment; career guidance; TRL 4 to TRL 7; women-led/science-led team; youth skills
excluded_topics: pure marketing accelerators without R&D budget; calls requiring strong existing commercial traction
extraction_notes: Folder name is IS Academy, while one transcript also discusses the product/project in broader terms. Profile should be reviewed with the client.

name: Intelswift
sector: AI / customer support automation / voice AI
technologies: Voice AI agents; SIP; WebRTC; AI helpdesk; NLP; LLMs; function calling; AI Actions; agentic workflows; low-latency speech systems; multilingual voice; HPC fine-tuning; acoustic/deepfake detection
product_description: DeepTech company building AI customer-support infrastructure with voice agents for SIP/WebRTC phone systems, a helpdesk platform and role/agent marketplace. Strong grant angle is a focused R&D module around real-time voice AI, security, multilingual support or custom HPC-trained models.
risks: Risk of TRL mismatch if the whole platform is presented as already mature; grant applications should focus on new TRL 4-6 modules, not the entire product. Needs detailed technical KPIs, work packages, risk plan, budget and possibly open-source/research component for AI-safety grants.
target_topics: AI; Voice AI; NLP; customer support automation; banking/fintech security; AI safety; private AI; HPC; multilingual models; deepfake detection; agentic AI security; women-led startup
excluded_topics: grants funding only marketing/sales; calls where mature TRL 8-9 product is out of scope unless scoped to a new R&D module
source_documents: grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/ВСЯ ВХІДНА ІНФОРМАЦІЯ.docx|grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/З Q&A міту_.docx|grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/З Q&A міту_2.docx|grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/Концепти.docx|grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/Питання для доопрацювання.docx|grant/initial_grants/Intelswift/Питання на міт.docx
extraction_notes: Several files repeat the same call/Q&A material. Profile is strong enough for initial matching.

name: Versi Bionics
technologies: bionic prosthetics; mechatronics; embedded systems; sensor fusion; EMG; motion sensing; adaptive control; ML-assisted personalization; modular mechanics; local production/service
product_description: Ukrainian DeepTech MedTech startup developing an accessible high-functionality bionic hand/prosthesis with proprietary control system, modular mechanics, sensors and local service/production model. Grant angles include product readiness, production scaling, AI/adaptive control and market/investment readiness.
risks: Needs clearer AI architecture and multimodal signal fusion; medical-device route to EU market must be detailed; IP strategy should be strengthened; some grants require patents, certifications, traction or cofinancing; budget allocation must respect grant caps.
target_topics: MedTech; DeepTech; prosthetics; assistive technology; sensor fusion; embedded systems; AI/ML personalization; manufacturing scale-up; Start-up EDGE; seed grants; EIT Health
excluded_topics: accelerators requiring full patent/strong traction if not ready; grants with unrealistic cofinancing or certification requirements
extraction_notes: Strong structured material exists, including positioning, feedback, seed grant discussion and technical Q&A.

name: Vignette ID
technologies: electronic toll collection; DSRC transponders; proprietary hardware encoding; Hardware-as-a-Service; Hybrid Mobility Core; Node.js backend; IoT logistics; multilingual legal-document AI; NLU; HPC fine-tuning
product_description: DeepTech mobility startup unifying cross-border electronic toll collection in Europe through a HaaS model, cloud backend and proprietary DSRC hardware encoding. Additional grant angle is AI/NLU for multilingual legal/toll fine document processing using HPC.
risks: Needs careful separation between existing commercial traction and new R&D module. AI/HPC proposal must prove why fine-tuning is needed beyond prompting. Legal/PII handling and EU jurisdiction complexity should be addressed.
target_topics: mobility; transportation; ETC; IoT; HaaS; cross-border logistics; AI for legal documents; HPC; multilingual NLU; EU market expansion
excluded_topics: grants unrelated to mobility/AI/DeepTech; calls that require early-stage/no-traction profile only
source_documents: grant/initial_grants/Vignette ID/Ffplus for VignetteID.docx|grant/initial_grants/Vignette ID/GLOVO Startup Lab 4.0_.docx
extraction_notes: Glovo file is close to structured form data. FFplus file is a concise concept note.
